product.title: Urban Decay All Nighter Glow Waterproof Makeup Setting Spray - Up to 24HR Wear, Glass-Skin Finish, Ultra-Fine Facial Mist, Dewy Foundation Face Primer, Transfer-Resistant, For All Skin Types
featureBullets: UP TO 24-HOUR WEAR: Urban Decay All Nighter Waterproof Makeup Setting Spray locks makeup in place for up to 24 hours. Waterproof, smudge-proof, transfer-resistant, fadeproof, and crackproof to keep your face and eye makeup looking fresh and perfect all day

WEIGHTLESS, ULTRA-FINE MIST: Ultra lightweight formula sprays evenly without disturbing makeup. Use it to prime, blend, and set cream and powder makeup for longwearing performance. Mist before & after makeup for extra grip. Use between each step to lock every layer

FORMULA: The new formula is scientifically proven to cool skin by 3 degrees Fahrenheit, providing a refreshing feel during application. Enriched with Power Set Film Formers to lock in makeup, Niacinamide to brighten complexion, and Goji Berry to boost skin radiance

GLOWY FINISH: All Nighter Setting Spray locks makeup in place with a radiant dewy finish that mimics glowing, glass-like skin. Provides 24 hour hydration, keeping makeup fresh and luminous without any cakiness. Available in Natural (skin-like), Matte (shine-free & blurring), and Glow (radiant glass-skin) finishes

HOW TO USE: Shake well. Hold 6-8 inches from face, spray in "X" and "T" motions at least 10 times. Close eyes and mouth. Use on beauty sponge to blend cream products, extend wear, and prevent creasing
product.returns: Non-returnable. Transportation of this item is subject to hazardous materials regulation

specification.value: #10,271 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #41 in Foundation Primers
Locks in makeup for up to 24 hours with glass-like finish. Scientifically proven to cool skin by 3 degrees fahrenheit.

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers praise the makeup setting spray's ability to impart a healthy glow and keep makeup in place all day. The product receives positive feedback for its application, with one customer noting it helps lock in concealer, and customers report their skin looks fresh, radiant, and younger after use. The spray delivers a super fine mist. While some customers find it worth the price, others consider it not the best value for money.

reviews.reviewText: It does wonders. It gives a nice glow and keeps makeup put for hours.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 29, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I agree with the other reviews that this product doesn’t give your skin a super dewy brightness HOWEVER if you are older, pale and/or have dry skin this is the spray for you. Any make up cakeyness or dry looking skin was gone after applying this. My skin looked more youthful, supple and the wrinkles were less pronounced. It dried almost instantly and didn’t smudge my make up at all. I work at a nursing home and am on my feet almost all day. Nursing homes are WARM and I sweat on and off throughout the day but I love wearing make up. This spray was just as efficient as other urban decay formulas, better than d’Alba and almost as good as Charlotte Tillbury as far as longevity. My skin looks better with this spray and I spend less money than the Tillbury spray but the Tillbury spray does last a tiny tiny bit better.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This is my favorite! It really gives a natural glow
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Not only does this spray keep makeup in place all day on my very oily face, it doesn't sting or burn when applied unlike alcohol-based products. It's good value for money, especially as it's from Urban Decay! It's a tiny bit tacky when you first apply it but it does dry after 1-3 minutes. It even helps keep some of my oil absorbing foundation on my T-zone over the course of a long work day. Great quality!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 26, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Okay.. we’re talking about urban decay, you can’t go wrong on this. So when I get a setting spray, I want one that is going to set my makeup. And.. those pesky pores and imperfections, each of us have. Ohhh 😾 those lumps and bumps we can’t stand. Well, it won’t get right if that!! But those, pores we hate and a lot of those imperfections it gets rid of a lot of those. And me, I really like it, I’m 63 and I’ve tried a lot. This is of of the best, worth the money even if it’s a tiny bottle 🫢😤 Love 💕 you urban decay
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Make up last a very long time
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 23, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Same great formula as it has always been but the new spray is top notch. It’s a much finer mist without the fear of the occasional messy/sloppy spray that the old spray had. It’s a much more even application.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 28, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Makeup stays flawless all day & with the perfect glow
reviews.reviewText: To my girls and makeup lovers: this spray does what it promises. My makeup lasts the entire day and gives my skin a subtle, beautiful glow that I absolutely love, and it’s the perfect amount where my face looks fresh and radiant, not oily or greasy. I’ve tried a lot of setting sprays over the years, and this is hands down the best one I’ve used. If you want your makeup to last while still looking natural and smooth, this is a must-have!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This stuff is better than I imagined, where has it been all my life! I noticed a big difference with looking fresher all day.

I think this gives me good wear on my makeup. The dewy glow starts to fade about 4 hours in but the make up stays put for the rest of the day. However I wouldn't say it's transfer proof. This is great for a photoshoot it will give you that fresh dewy look

reviews.reviewTitle: One of the best setting spray

reviews.reviewText: Makeup stays put even i. Mexico
